title: pellaea lonchophora
intro: Pellaea lonchophora, also known as Australian sword fern, is a species of fern native to Australia, characterized by its long, narrow fronds. It is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pellaea lonchophora include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. Pellaea lonchophora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
